description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag for a football fan. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college. Height:18" Width:12.5"Depth:6Capacity:28 L Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with pouches and a zippered mesh compartment One front utility compartment with swoosh logo on it FCB badge on the front Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
